roles.content: Analytic philosophy: A comprehensive examination of analytic philosophy within History of Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: British Journal for the History of Philosophy

roles.content: Critical perspectives on analytic philosophy: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to analytic philosophy.
Recent developments in analytic philosophy: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of analytic philosophy in contemporary philosophy.
roles.source: Journal of the History of Philosophy
